caption: A wide, open field of dry, golden-brown grass extends under a clear, pale blue sky. A tall, thin utility pole stands on the left side of the scene, with a power line stretching horizontally across the top of the frame. In the distance, a white vehicle slowly enters the scene from the right, moving toward the center. The vehicle appears to be a white SUV or van with a roof rack. In the final frame, a small figure of a person is visible standing near the far right edge of the horizon. Across the bottom of the image, a single line of white text remains static throughout the sequence, stating, "Once 5 children came to us, one was in a stable condition". The environment is desolate and flat, with no other structures or people visible aside from the moving vehicle and the distant figure.
